description: An executable program in the build pipeline. Wrapped by a PackML state machine (ISA-TR88.00.02) so every run transitions through the same lifecycle: IDLE -> STARTING -> EXECUTE -> COMPLETING -> COMPLETE (or -> ABORTING -> ABORTED on failure). Pre/post checks run at each transition.

category.description: extract | build | render | regen | test | split

inputs.description: Paths or globs this program reads

outputs.description: Paths or globs this program writes

depends_on.description: Program IDs that must run before this one

state_log.description: Path to most recent PackMLState instance

last_state.description: Most recent state (IDLE | EXECUTE | COMPLETE | ABORTED)

last_run_at.description: UTC ISO timestamp of last run
